ABOUT_STORY_HEADLINE_2: A medical discount program is not just a card, but an integrated healthcare network that makes access to medical services easier, more trusted, and more effective.

ABOUT_STORY_DESC_1: Share & Care is an Egyptian company specialized in medical discount programs for individuals and companies, operating since 2019 to make healthcare more accessible at suitable prices.

PRIVACY_PAGE_SUBTITLE: This page explains how we handle user data and content published on the platform.
PRIVACY_INTRO_TEXT: The Care & Share platform respects the privacy of all users and visitors. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and what choices are available to you when browsing services and listings, creating an account, or managing your listing on the platform.
PRIVACY_DATA_LEAD: We may collect the following types of data when you use the website:
PRIVACY_DATA_ITEM_1: Account data such as your name, email address, phone number, and encrypted password.
PRIVACY_DATA_ITEM_2: Listing data such as business name, category, address, images, and working hours.
PRIVACY_DATA_ITEM_3: Technical usage data such as IP address, device type, browser, and pages visited.
PRIVACY_DATA_ITEM_4: Subscription or payment data limited to what is needed to activate the service, without storing sensitive payment card details on our servers.
PRIVACY_USAGE_LEAD: We use collected data for the following purposes:
PRIVACY_USAGE_ITEM_1: Creating accounts, signing users in, and managing permissions.
PRIVACY_USAGE_ITEM_2: Displaying listings and businesses correctly in search results and categories.
PRIVACY_USAGE_ITEM_3: Improving user experience and enhancing search and browsing performance on the website.
PRIVACY_USAGE_ITEM_4: Contacting you regarding requests, support, important notices, or service updates.
PRIVACY_USAGE_ITEM_5: Reviewing suspicious activity and protecting the platform from misuse or unlawful behavior.
PRIVACY_SHARING_TEXT: We do not sell your personal data to any third party. Some data may be shared only when necessary with technical service providers, payment gateways, or competent authorities when required by law or needed to provide the service.
PRIVACY_COOKIES_TEXT: The website may use cookies or local storage to remember language preferences, keep login sessions active, and improve performance and browsing experience. You may disable these tools in your browser settings, but some features may not work fully afterward.
PRIVACY_SECURITY_TEXT: We apply appropriate security measures to protect data from unauthorized access, alteration, or loss. We keep data only for the period needed to operate the platform, comply with legal and regulatory obligations, resolve disputes, and protect our legitimate rights.
PRIVACY_RIGHTS_LEAD: Subject to applicable law, you may request the following:
PRIVACY_RIGHTS_ITEM_1: Reviewing, updating, or correcting your data.
PRIVACY_RIGHTS_ITEM_2: Requesting account deletion or removal of non-essential data.
PRIVACY_RIGHTS_ITEM_3: Objecting to certain uses related to marketing or non-essential notifications.
PRIVACY_RIGHTS_ITEM_4: Requesting suspension or restriction of specific data processing where there is a legitimate reason.
PRIVACY_UPDATES_TEXT: We may update this privacy policy from time to time to reflect platform changes or legal requirements. If material changes are made, the updated version will be published on this page with a revised update date.
PRIVACY_CONTACT_TEXT: If you have any questions about data collection, modification, or deletion, you can contact us directly through the contact page.
TERMS_PAGE_SUBTITLE: These terms govern your use of the platform, services, and listings published on the website.
TERMS_ACCEPTANCE_TEXT: By using the Care & Share website, you acknowledge that you have read and agreed to these terms. If you do not agree with any part of them, you must stop using the website and its related services.
TERMS_SERVICE_TEXT: The platform provides a digital space for displaying businesses, services, and relevant activities. It helps users search, browse, reach contact information, and subscribe to certain paid features. We provide the technical platform and do not guarantee a direct contractual relationship between users and service providers except where the service itself clearly states otherwise.
TERMS_ACCOUNT_LEAD: When creating an account on the website, the user agrees to the following:
TERMS_ACCOUNT_ITEM_1: Provide accurate, current, and complete information.
TERMS_ACCOUNT_ITEM_2: Keep login credentials confidential and do not share them with others.
TERMS_ACCOUNT_ITEM_3: Accept responsibility for any activity that occurs through the account.
TERMS_ACCOUNT_ITEM_4: Notify website management immediately if any unauthorized use is suspected.
TERMS_CONTENT_TEXT: The listing owner or account holder bears full responsibility for texts, images, contact details, and all information published on the platform. Content must be accurate, lawful, not misleading, and must not infringe intellectual property, privacy, or any applicable laws.
TERMS_SUBSCRIPTIONS_TEXT_1: Some website features may be available through paid plans or subscriptions. By subscribing, the user confirms that they reviewed the plan details before payment and understands that activation is based on the duration and benefits shown on the pricing or subscription page.
TERMS_SUBSCRIPTIONS_TEXT_2: Platform management may update plan prices or contents in the future. Such changes apply to new subscriptions or renewals unless clearly stated otherwise.
TERMS_PROHIBITED_LEAD: The website may not be used for any of the following:
TERMS_PROHIBITED_ITEM_1: Publishing unlawful, abusive, misleading, or inappropriate content.
TERMS_PROHIBITED_ITEM_2: Impersonating another person or entity, or intentionally providing false information.
TERMS_PROHIBITED_ITEM_3: Attempting to breach, disable, or negatively affect the website or its technical infrastructure.
TERMS_PROHIBITED_ITEM_4: Using the platform to send spam or collect user data without authorization.
TERMS_IP_TEXT: All elements of the platform, including designs, visual identity, organizational texts, and data presentation methods, are owned by or licensed to the website. They may not be copied, reused, or republished without prior permission, except for content uploaded by users while they retain their rights to it.
TERMS_SUSPENSION_TEXT: We reserve the right to review, suspend, or remove any account or listing that violates these terms, harms users or the platform, or exposes us to legal or operational risk, without any obligation to keep violating content published.
TERMS_LIABILITY_TEXT: We aim to provide a stable and accurate service, but we do not guarantee that the website will be entirely free from interruptions or technical errors. The accuracy of listing data is the responsibility of the publisher, and the platform is not liable for any direct or indirect losses resulting from complete reliance on content published by users or third parties.
TERMS_UPDATES_TEXT: We may modify the terms of service when needed to develop the platform or comply with legal or regulatory requirements. Continued use of the website after updates are published constitutes implied acceptance of the revised version.
TERMS_CONTACT_TEXT: If you need clarification regarding subscriptions, listing publication, or account usage, you can contact us and we will assist you.
